description: 100% stacked bar chart showing each SBE region's 2025 mix of proficiency levels — Level 1 or 2 (rust, on the common left baseline), Level 3 (pale teal), Level 4 (mid teal), and Level 5 (dark teal) — with white separators between segments. Regions are sorted by their below-grade-level share (Level 1 or 2), which is labeled on each bar: it ranges from 41 percent in North Central (bottom) to 51 percent in Sandhills (top).

title.text: Below grade level ranges from 41% (North Central) to 51% (Sandhills)
subtitle: Share of NC students by achievement level, by SBE region, 2025. Below grade level = Level 1 or 2 (below GLP, Level 3+).
It sits on the common left baseline — sorted and labeled so regions compare precisely.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI accountability test scores (achievement levels, all subjects and grades, all students), by SBE region, 2025. Style-guide demo.
